requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) — Household Appliances (SONCAP + NIS CISPR 14 / IEC 60335 family)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——家用电器（SONCAP + NIS CISPR 14 / IEC 60335系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——家用電器（SONCAP + NIS CISPR 14 / IEC 60335系列）

summary.en: Refrigerating appliances placed on the Nigerian market must meet electromagnetic compatibility requirements covering both emission and immunity. The Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON) adopts the relevant IEC/CISPR standards as Nigerian Industrial Standards: emissions to NIS CISPR 14-1 (electromagnetic compatibility — requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) and immunity to NIS CISPR 14-2 (Part 2: Immunity). These are demonstrated through the SONCAP conformity assessment alongside electrical safety. Where the appliance contains a radio/wireless module (for example smart-fridge connectivity), separate type approval from the Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) is also required for the radio function. EMC test data forms part of the technical package supporting the SON Product Certificate.
summary.zh: 投放尼日利亚市场的制冷器具须满足涵盖发射与抗扰度的电磁兼容要求。尼日利亚标准组织（SON）将相关IEC/CISPR标准采纳为尼日利亚工业标准：发射按NIS CISPR 14-1（电磁兼容——家用电器、电动工具及类似器具的要求——第1部分：发射），抗扰度按NIS CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗扰度）。上述要求与电气安全一并通过SONCAP符合性评定证明。若器具含无线电/无线模块（如智能冰箱联网功能），其无线电功能另须取得尼日利亚通信委员会（NCC）的型号核准。EMC检测数据构成支撑SON产品证书技术资料的一部分。
summary.zht: 投放奈及利亞市場的製冷器具須滿足涵蓋發射與抗擾度的電磁相容要求。奈及利亞標準組織（SON）將相關IEC/CISPR標準採納為奈及利亞工業標準：發射按NIS CISPR 14-1（電磁相容——家用電器、電動工具及類似器具的要求——第1部分：發射），抗擾度按NIS CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗擾度）。上述要求與電氣安全一併通過SONCAP符合性評定證明。若器具含無線電/無線模組（如智慧冰箱聯網功能），其無線電功能另須取得奈及利亞通訊委員會（NCC）的型號核准。EMC檢測數據構成支撐SON產品證書技術資料的一部分。

standards_or_laws: NIS CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (adopted by SON)
NIS CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity (adopted by SON)
SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) — EMC evidence forms part of the technical package for the SON Product Certificate
Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) type approval — required separately for any embedded radio/wireless module

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household refrigerating appliances are set by GB 4343.1 (electromagnetic compatibility — requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission, equivalent to CISPR 14-1) and GB 4343.2 / GB 17625 series for immunity and harmonics. These standards are part of the CCC certification scope for refrigerators in China and are tested by CNAS-accredited laboratories at 220 V 50 Hz. The technical content closely mirrors CISPR 14, since GB 4343.1 is derived from it. However, Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test data is issued for the domestic market and is not accepted by SON as a substitute for SONCAP EMC evidence; the data may, in practice, support a fresh SONCAP submission subject to the certification body's acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的EMC要求由GB 4343.1（电磁兼容——家用电器、电动工具及类似器具的要求——第1部分：发射，等同CISPR 14-1）及GB 4343.2 / GB 17625系列（抗扰度与谐波）规定。上述标准属于中国冰箱CCC认证范围，由CNAS认可实验室在220伏50赫兹下测试。由于GB 4343.1源自CISPR 14，技术内容高度一致。但中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测数据系针对国内市场出具，不被SON接受为替代SONCAP的EMC证据；实际操作中，该数据可在认证机构接受的前提下支撑新的SONCAP提交。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的EMC要求由GB 4343.1（電磁相容——家用電器、電動工具及類似器具的要求——第1部分：發射，等同CISPR 14-1）及GB 4343.2 / GB 17625系列（抗擾度與諧波）規定。上述標準屬於中國冰箱CCC認證範圍，由CNAS認可實驗室在220伏50赫茲下測試。由於GB 4343.1源自CISPR 14，技術內容高度一致。但中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測數據系針對國內市場出具，不被SON接受為替代SONCAP的EMC證據；實際操作中，該數據可在認證機構接受的前提下支撐新的SONCAP提交。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (equivalent to CISPR 14-1; part of CCC scope)
GB 17625.1 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (read with EMC package)

gap.en: Because GB 4343.1 and NIS CISPR 14-1 share the same CISPR base text, the technical EMC content is closely aligned, but procedurally the exporter must present EMC evidence within the SONCAP package rather than relying on the Chinese CCC file. Exporters should: (1) submit emission (CISPR 14-1) and immunity (CISPR 14-2) test reports from a laboratory accepted by their SONCAP licensed certification body; (2) confirm reports cover the appliance as configured for Nigeria (230 V 50 Hz mains conditions); (3) where any smart/connected variant includes a radio module, obtain separate NCC type approval for the radio function — this is outside SONCAP and is frequently overlooked. Existing GB 4343.1 CCC reports may reduce the testing burden but acceptance must be confirmed with the certification body.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4343.1与NIS CISPR 14-1共享相同的CISPR基础文本，EMC技术内容高度一致，但程序上出口商须在SONCAP资料内提交EMC证据，而非依赖中国CCC档案。出口商应：（1）提交由其SONCAP持牌认证机构接受的实验室出具的发射（CISPR 14-1）与抗扰度（CISPR 14-2）检测报告；（2）确认报告涵盖按尼日利亚配置（230伏50赫兹电源条件）的器具；（3）凡智能/联网型号含无线电模块者，须就无线电功能另行取得NCC型号核准——此项不在SONCAP范围内且常被忽略。现有GB 4343.1 CCC报告或可减轻测试负担，但须向认证机构确认接受情况。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4343.1與NIS CISPR 14-1共享相同的CISPR基礎文本，EMC技術內容高度一致，但程序上出口商須在SONCAP資料內提交EMC證據，而非依賴中國CCC檔案。出口商應：（1）提交由其SONCAP持牌認證機構接受的實驗室出具的發射（CISPR 14-1）與抗擾度（CISPR 14-2）檢測報告；（2）確認報告涵蓋按奈及利亞配置（230伏50赫茲電源條件）的器具；（3）凡智慧/聯網型號含無線電模組者，須就無線電功能另行取得NCC型號核准——此項不在SONCAP範圍內且常被忽略。現有GB 4343.1 CCC報告或可減輕測試負擔，但須向認證機構確認接受情況。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformity (NIS CISPR 14-1 emission / CISPR 14-2 immunity) required within SONCAP; NCC type approval mandatory and separate for any embedded radio module
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1 / GB 4343.2 EMC compliance within CCC scope; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance to NIS CISPR 14-1/14-2 is required within the SONCAP package for refrigerating appliances. Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC data is technically aligned but must be re-presented for SONCAP, and acceptance of existing reports is at the certification body's discretion. Any embedded radio/wireless module additionally requires separate NCC type approval, which sits outside SONCAP.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 制冷器具须在SONCAP资料内提交符合NIS CISPR 14-1/14-2的EMC合规证据。中国GB 4343.1 CCC数据技术上一致，但须为SONCAP重新提交，现有报告是否接受由认证机构裁量。任何内置无线电/无线模块另须取得独立于SONCAP之外的NCC型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 製冷器具須在SONCAP資料內提交符合NIS CISPR 14-1/14-2的EMC合規證據。中國GB 4343.1 CCC數據技術上一致，但須為SONCAP重新提交，現有報告是否接受由認證機構裁量。任何內置無線電/無線模組另須取得獨立於SONCAP之外的NCC型號核准。
